response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, extensive open-source contributions, and a long track record in software development across diverse domains, including Linux, UML-adjacent modeling, and architecture design — but lacks demonstrated leadership experience in team management, client advisory, or project oversight at an executive level, and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with strong Linux and DLang/TypeScript expertise
Proven full-stack architecture experience across web, embedded, and distributed systems
Demonstrated ability to lead technical innovation and mentor via workshops and community projects
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of managing teams, leading client projects, or executive-level decision-making
Lacks explicit documentation of UML modeling, requirements management, or IT security/compliance experience
